# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

# Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for zero-trust service mesh
# These resources define explicit authorization policies for inter-service communication

---
# ============================================================
# DEFAULT DENY POLICY - Applied at namespace level
# Ensures all traffic is denied unless explicitly authorized
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: zero-trust-policy-generator
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 0
  proxyProtocol: unknown

---
# ============================================================
# API GATEWAY SERVER
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Authorization: Only ingress controller can reach API Gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-allow-ingress
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-nginx
          namespace: ingress-nginx

---
# Authorization: Only probes can reach admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ============================================================
# USER SERVICE SERVER
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 9091
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Authorization: API Gateway and Auth Service can call User Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-gateway-and-auth
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices
        - name: auth-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Order Service and Notification Service can call User Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc-allow-internal
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: notification-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Probes for User Service admin
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ============================================================
# AUTH SERVICE SERVER
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: auth-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: auth-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: 9092
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Authorization: API Gateway can call Auth Service for token validation
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-service-allow-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Probes for Auth Service admin
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ============================================================
# ORDER SERVICE SERVER
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 50052
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 9093
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Authorization: API Gateway can call Order Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Payment Service and Inventory Service can call Order Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc-allow-internal
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Probes for Order Service admin
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ============================================================
# PAYMENT SERVICE SERVER
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 9094
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Authorization: Only Order Service can call Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-allow-order
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Probes for Payment Service admin
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ============================================================
# INVENTORY SERVICE SERVER
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 8085
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 50053
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 9095
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Authorization: API Gateway and Order Service can call Inventory Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-allow-gateway-order
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Order Service can call Inventory Service gRPC for stock checks
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-grpc-allow-order
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Probes for Inventory Service admin
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ============================================================
# NOTIFICATION SERVICE SERVER
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8086
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 9096
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Authorization: Order Service and Payment Service can call Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-order-payment
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: auth-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Probes for Notification Service admin
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ============================================================
# ANALYTICS SERVICE SERVER (read-only, receives events)
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: analytics-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: analytics-service
  port: 8087
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: analytics-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: analytics-service
  port: 9097
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Authorization: Multiple services can send events to Analytics Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-allow-event-producers
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: analytics-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: microservices
        - name: order-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: user-service
          namespace: microservices
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: microservices

---
# Authorization: Probes for Analytics Service admin
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-admin-probes
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: analytics-service-admin
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ============================================================
# LINKERD VIZ / PROMETHEUS SCRAPING AUTHORIZATION
# Allow Prometheus to scrape metrics from all services
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: proxy-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: linkerd-proxy
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: linkerd-admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: proxy-admin-allow-viz
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: proxy-admin
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: linkerd-viz
        - name: tap
          namespace: linkerd-viz

---
# ============================================================
# AUTHORIZATION POLICY (v1alpha1) - Route-level policies
# Fine-grained HTTP route authorization for critical endpoints
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-charge-route
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: payment-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: payment-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payment-mtls-authn
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# ============================================================
# AUTHORIZATION POLICY - User Service sensitive endpoints
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-pii-route
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: user-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: user-service-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: user-service-mtls-authn
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "auth-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# ============================================================
# AUTHORIZATION POLICY - Auth Service token endpoint
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: auth-service-token-route
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: auth-service
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: auth-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: auth-service-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: auth-service-mtls-authn
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# ============================================================
# NETWORK AUTHENTICATION - Restrict to cluster-internal CIDRs
# Additional layer for services that accept unauthenticated probes
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-internal-networks
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
# ============================================================
# SERVICE ACCOUNTS - Required for mTLS identity
# Each microservice must have its own ServiceAccount
# ============================================================
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: api-gateway
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: user-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: auth-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: order-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: payment-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: inventory-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: notification-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/component: analytics-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false

---
# ============================================================
# NAMESPACE CONFIGURATION
# Set default policy to deny to prevent "authz missing" warnings
# ============================================================
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: zero-trust-mesh
  annotations:
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-await: enabled
